title: XBOX suffers a wave of massive layoffs and its CEO blames Phil Spencer's strategy
summary: Microsoft cuts thousands of jobs in its video game studios, sparking criticism from the Senate to the workers themselves.

title: Mario Kart Tour will definitively close on September 30, 2026
summary: Nintendo ends its popular racing game for mobile, joining the withdrawal of its titles on portable devices.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced receives mixed reviews but sells better than Shadows on Steam
summary: The remake of the classic pirate game improves graphically but critics point out that it does not achieve the depth of the original.

title: IO Interactive closes its Istanbul studio and recovers Fantasy project after Xbox withdraws
summary: The Hitman developer loses funding from Microsoft but retains ownership of its next RPG and lays off staff.

title: The Blood of Dawnwalker, the new vampire RPG, launches in September 2026 and promises innovation
summary: Former members of CD Projekt Red create a title that combines combat, romance, and intrigue with mechanics similar to The Witcher 3.

title: id Software loses half of its staff in Xbox layoffs
summary: The creators of DOOM suffer massive cuts while John Romero shows his support for those affected.

title: Final Fantasy VII Ever Crisis will shut down its servers on October 7
summary: Square Enix confirms the end of the Final Fantasy saga game as a service, following the trend of abandoning mobile titles.

title: Arc Raiders renews its matchmaking system and reduces in-game fraud
summary: The extraction game now allows solo, duo, or trio matches and manages to reduce cheaters below 1%.

title: Subnautica 2 receives its first major update with new defensive mechanics
summary: Players will be able to stun fish and the behaviors of aquatic fauna are improved.

title: Nintendo Switch Online adds four classic Game Boy and GBA games
summary: Subscribers can enjoy titles like Wario Land: Super Mario Land 3 and Dr. Mario & Puzzle League.

title: Obsidian lays off 25% of its staff after Microsoft cuts
summary: The Outer Worlds studio suffers a significant reduction in staff as part of Xbox's restructuring.

title: Two brothers confess to stealing more than £71,000 in Pokémon cards
summary: The accused stole from several specialized stores before being captured by the police.

title: Pokémon Winds and Waves could include 300 new creatures, according to rumors
summary: The possible new generation divides fans between excitement and skepticism.

title: LEGO presents five new Pokémon sets with minifigures
summary: The new builds include iconic characters but the high prices generate controversy.

title: Brigandine Abyss releases a demo on July 30 for consoles
summary: The tactical strategy game returns with an aesthetic that recalls Fire Emblem.

title: Spyro and Toys for Bob developers want to revive Banjo-Kazooie
summary: The studios express their interest in creating a new installment of the franchise if Xbox allows it.

title: Sony faces player boycott for eliminating physical discs
summary: Users threaten to cancel PS Plus and discover they can get discounts by doing so.

title: Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader receives a massive patch on Switch 2 with all DLC free
summary: The strategy RPG returns to Nintendo's console with technical improvements and free downloadable content.

title: Bethesda announces a change of course after 15 years without releasing a new The Elder Scrolls or Fallout
summary: The company will focus on games with greater potential, leaving behind criticism for its long drought of releases.

title: Destiny 2 fans create a game to throw tomatoes at ex-CEO Pete Parsons
summary: Faced with discontent over the direction of the game, players develop an interactive parody to protest against the executive.
